mapper.sql: id, title, resume, description, image, catgory, produce_type, price, browse_num, push_status, push_time, recommend, provider_name, account_id, created_time, updated_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nb_farm_produce ( id, title, resume, description, image, catgory, produce_type, price, browse_num, push_status, push_time, recommend, provider_name, account_id, created_time, updated_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{title}, #{resume}, #{description}, #{image}, #{catgory}, #{produceType}, #{price}, #{browseNum}, #{pushStatus}, #{pushTime}, #{recommend}, #{providerName}, #{accountId}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM nb_farm_produce WHERE id IN
#{id}
